name: zimmer-catalog
description: Zimmer's self-contained AIR catalog. Every artifact index lives in this repo and resolves fully offline (no private GitHub catalogs, no network), so the app's config services always resolve non-empty data. Skills in `skills/` are Zimmer-specific and default-on for the `zimmer` root via `default_in_roots`; generic workflow skills come from the orchestrator's own default skill set.
